S.FORM: yani ku inu'/ yani ku aynu'
S.PHON: jani ku inuʔ/ jani ku ajnuʔ
S.FORM: yani ku inu'/ yani ku aynu'
S.PHON: jani ku inuʔ/ jani ku ajnuʔ

S.FORM: glu mu/ baays mu/ kanayril mu/ mamaliku mu
S.PHON: ɣlu mu/ βaajs~ɕ mu/ kanajril mu/ mamaliku mu
S.FORM: glu mu/ baays mu/ kanayril mu/ mamaliku mu
S.PHON: ɣlu mu/ βaajs~ɕ mu/ kanajril mu/ mamaliku mu

S.FORM: glu mu/ baays mu/ mamaliku mu
S.PHON: ɣlu mu/ βaajs~ɕ mu/ mamaliku mu
S.FORM: glu mu/ baays mu/ mamaliku mu
S.PHON: ɣlu mu/ βaajs~ɕ mu/ mamaliku mu

S.TRANSL: 哥哥、姊姊(通稱)；對比自己年長者之尊稱
弟弟、妹妹(通稱)；對比自己年少之稱呼
伯父；叔叔；舅舅；姑丈(通稱)
伯母；嬸嬸；舅母；姑姑(通稱)

S.FORM: raqni' na kahuneq/ raqni' na kahuy
S.PHON: raqniʔ na kaħuneq/ raqniʔ na kaħuj
S.FORM: raqni' na kahuneq/ raqni' na kahuy
S.PHON: raqniʔ na kaħuneq/ raqniʔ na kaħuj

S.FORM: taqiyng na kahuneq/ taqiyng na kahuy
S.PHON: taqijŋ na kaħuneq/ taqijŋ na kaħuj
S.FORM: taqiyng na kahuneq/ taqiyng na kahuy
S.PHON: taqijŋ na kaħuneq/ taqijŋ na kaħuj

S.FORM: batah na kahuneq/batah na kahuneq kahuy
S.PHON: βataħ na kaħuneq/βataħ na kaħuneq kaħuj
S.FORM: batah na kahuneq/batah na kahuneq kahuy
S.PHON: βataħ na kaħuneq/βataħ na kaħuneq kaħuj

S.FORM: aimag cu raramat/ paptupiyux cu raramat
S.PHON: aimaɣ ʦ~ʨu raramat/ paptupijux ʦ~ʨu raramat
S.FORM: aimag cu raramat/ paptupiyux cu raramat
S.PHON: aimaɣ ʦ~ʨu raramat/ paptupijux ʦ~ʨu raramat

S.TRANSL: the thing stuck between the teeth

S.FORM: papawng cu pinateq/ papawng cu pinatas
S.PHON: papawŋ ʦ~ʨu pinateq/ papawŋ ʦ~ʨu pinatas~ɕ
S.FORM: papawng cu pinateq/ papawng cu pinatas
S.PHON: papawŋ ʦ~ʨu pinateq/ papawŋ ʦ~ʨu pinatas~ɕ

S.FORM: puqing na ragiyax/ yahu' na ragiyax
S.PHON: puqiŋ na raɣijax/ jaħuʔ na raɣijax
S.FORM: puqing na ragiyax/ yahu' na ragiyax
S.PHON: puqiŋ na raɣijax/ jaħuʔ na raɣijax
S.TRANSL: at the foot of the mountain

S.FORM: ciax na Utux/ taptap na Utux
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiax na utux/ taptap na utux
S.FORM: ciax na Utux/ taptap na Utux
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨiax na utux/ taptap na utux

S.FORM: siyag na baru'/ aping na baru'
S.PHON: s~ɕijaɣ na βaruʔ/ apiŋ na βaruʔ
S.FORM: siyag na baru'/ aping na baru'
S.PHON: s~ɕijaɣ na βaruʔ/ apiŋ na βaruʔ

S.FORM: hakri' na Utux/ hakaw na Utux
S.PHON: ħakriʔ na utux/ ħakaw na utux
S.FORM: hakri' na Utux/ hakaw na Utux
S.PHON: ħakriʔ na utux/ ħakaw na utux

S.FORM: mahantan a kaal la/ ini' saluwi a kaal la
S.PHON: maħantan a kaal la/ iniʔ s~ɕaluwi a kaal la
S.FORM: mahantan a kaal la/ ini' saluwi a kaal la
S.PHON: maħantan a kaal la/ iniʔ s~ɕaluwi a kaal la

S.FORM: latanux na imuwag/ suug na imuwag/ lata' na imu/ suug na imu
S.PHON: latanux na imuwaɣ/ s~ɕuuɣ na imuwaɣ/ lataʔ na imu/ s~ɕuuɣ na imu
S.FORM: latanux na imuwag/ suug na imuwag/ lata' na imu/ suug na imu
S.PHON: latanux na imuwaɣ/ s~ɕuuɣ na imuwaɣ/ lataʔ na imu/ s~ɕuuɣ na imu

S.FORM: guma cu ki'man/ gumba cu ki'man
S.PHON: ɣuma ʦ~ʨu kiʔman/ ɣumβa ʦ~ʨu kiʔman
S.FORM: guma cu ki'man/ gumba cu ki'man
S.PHON: ɣuma ʦ~ʨu kiʔman/ ɣumβa ʦ~ʨu kiʔman

S.FORM: Gaga' na tatubunan cu Utux na nanabakis
S.PHON: ɣaɣaʔ na tatuβunan ʦ~ʨu utux na nanaβakis~ɕ
S.FORM: Gaga' na tatubunan cu Utux na nanabakis
S.PHON: ɣaɣaʔ na tatuβunan ʦ~ʨu utux na nanaβakis~ɕ

S.TRANSL: witchcarft appliance (witch doctor use it for treatment)

S.FORM: gagalgan cu kulu'/ autuan cu kulu'
S.PHON: ɣaɣalɣan ʦ~ʨu kuluʔ/ autuan ʦ~ʨu kuluʔ
S.FORM: gagalgan cu kulu'/ autuan cu kulu'
S.PHON: ɣaɣalɣan ʦ~ʨu kuluʔ/ autuan ʦ~ʨu kuluʔ

S.FORM: kumayhu na qaba'/ kumayi' na qaba'
S.PHON: kumajħu na qaβaʔ/ kumajiʔ na qaβaʔ
S.FORM: kumayhu na qaba'/ kumayi' na qaba'
S.PHON: kumajħu na qaβaʔ/ kumajiʔ na qaβaʔ

S.FORM: qumali' cu qali' na kahuneq/ qumali' cu qali' na kahuy
S.PHON: qumaliʔ ʦ~ʨu qaliʔ na kaħuneq/ qumaliʔ ʦ~ʨu qaliʔ na kaħuj
S.FORM: qumali' cu qali' na kahuneq/ qumali' cu qali' na kahuy
S.PHON: qumaliʔ ʦ~ʨu qaliʔ na kaħuneq/ qumaliʔ ʦ~ʨu qaliʔ na kaħuj
S.TRANSL: peeling the bark of a tree

S.FORM: mateq cu qalimu'/ matas cu qalimu'
S.PHON: mateq ʦ~ʨu qalimuʔ/ matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu qalimuʔ
S.FORM: mateq cu qalimu'/ matas cu qalimu'
S.PHON: mateq ʦ~ʨu qalimuʔ/ matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu qalimuʔ

S.TRANSL: calling (e.g. calling before feeding the chickens)

S.FORM: mapapugagayay ta' la/ mapugagayay ta' la/ masasugagayay ta' la/ masugagayay ta' la
S.PHON: mapapuɣaɣajaj taʔ la/ mapuɣaɣajaj taʔ la/ mas~ɕas~ɕuɣaɣajaj taʔ la/ mas~ɕuɣaɣajaj taʔ la
S.FORM: mapapugagayay ta' la/ mapugagayay ta' la/ masasugagayay ta' la/ masugagayay ta' la
S.PHON: mapapuɣaɣajaj taʔ la/ mapuɣaɣajaj taʔ la/ mas~ɕas~ɕuɣaɣajaj taʔ la/ mas~ɕuɣaɣajaj taʔ la

S.TRANSL: dry (e.g., drying clothes in the sun)
pack up (imperatives, as in pack up)
fishing for fish and shrimp by cage
lift off (as in lift off the lid).
burn (as in burning the hair of prey)

S.FORM: iqaat lupung na Itaal ku usalan
S.PHON: iqaat lupuŋ na itaal ku us~ɕalan
S.FORM: iqaat lupung na Itaal ku usalan
S.PHON: iqaat lupuŋ na itaal ku us~ɕalan
S.TRANSL: marry to a non-ethnic clan member
未熟的(如這塊肉是生的)
undercooked (if this piece of meat is raw)
脆弱(如這根鐵絲易斷裂)
fragile (e.g. this wire is prone to breakage)
in the process of (doing something or happening)
